seoTitle: St Fillans vs St George — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Fillans and St George. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Fillans vs St George: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Fillans and St George.
heading: St Fillans vs St George — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Fillans, New South Wales and St George, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Fillans has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to St George (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Fillans or St George safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Fillans has a flood risk score of 24/100, while St George scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Fillans scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. St George scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Fillans or St George?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Fillans has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
